channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Viture already has the best smart glasses ecosystem, and these two new products somehow make it even better
item.description: I've loved Viture's extended smart glasses ecosystem for years, and now things just got even better with a pair of new releases.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Viture Beast smart glasses connected to an Abxylute S9V controller, with Monster Hunter Outlanders playing on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: Viture Beast smart glasses connected to an Abxylute S9V controller, with Monster Hunter Outlanders playing on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: Viture Beast smart glasses connected to an Abxylute S9V controller, with Monster Hunter Outlanders playing on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: Google's Fitbit Air is finally here, and it's the screenless fitness band we've been waiting for
item.description: Google's highly anticipated fitness band, the Fitbit Air, is official — and it only costs $99. Here's everything it can track on your wrist.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.
media:content.media:text: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.
media:content.media:title: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.

item.title: The Fitbit app is rebranding and becoming Google Health — here's what to know
item.description: Google is rebranding the Fitbit app to Google Health, and making sweeping changes to the service along the way. Here's what Fitbit users should know.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The app overview for the Google Health app.
media:content.media:text: The app overview for the Google Health app.
media:content.media:title: The app overview for the Google Health app.

item.title: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro is the most innovative budget phone on the market — it's also free at Metro by T-Mobile
item.description: Innovative display technology doesn't have to cost an arm and a leg - Metro by T-Mobile is giving away the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro for FREE with an eligible line.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Quick toggles on the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's display
media:content.media:text: Quick toggles on the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's display
media:content.media:title: Quick toggles on the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's display

item.title: I finally figured out why no one can hear me in multiplayer Quest games
item.description: Have you ever been playing a Meta Quest multiplayer game, but no one can hear you? I finally found the fix, and it isn't the game's fault.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Holding my hand over my mouth while wearing a Meta Quest 3 with a BoboVR S3 Pro head strap
media:content.media:text: Holding my hand over my mouth while wearing a Meta Quest 3 with a BoboVR S3 Pro head strap
media:content.media:title: Holding my hand over my mouth while wearing a Meta Quest 3 with a BoboVR S3 Pro head strap

item.title: Chipolo and Secrid just created the smartest way to never lose your wallet again
item.description: Chipolo collaborated with Secrid, a Dutch pocketwear brand, to give us an excellent hack for finding our wallets.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Chipolo x Secrid Trackable Miniwallet in black
media:content.media:text: Chipolo x Secrid Trackable Miniwallet in black
media:content.media:title: Chipolo x Secrid Trackable Miniwallet in black

item.title: I used the world's thinnest 13-inch tablet, and it made me ditch the iPad Pro
item.description: Huawei just launched the MatePad Pro Max, and with a 13.2-inch OLED panel, bigger battery, and ultra-sleek design, it may just be the iPad Pro rival you need.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Testing the Huawei MatePad Pro Max
media:content.media:text: Testing the Huawei MatePad Pro Max
media:content.media:title: Testing the Huawei MatePad Pro Max

item.title: Google Gemini is finally becoming the personal assistant we were promised
item.description: Google’s rumored Gemini-powered Remy AI could handle tasks like a real digital assistant.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:text: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus
media:content.media:title: Gemini on the Galaxy S26 Plus

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs. Galaxy Z Fold 6: Likely better in (almost) every way
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 is set to further iterate the big-screen Samsung foldable, but Galaxy Z Fold 6 users might hold onto their S Pen.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: Galaxy Z Fold 6 against colorful background
media:content.media:text: Galaxy Z Fold 6 against colorful background
media:content.media:title: Galaxy Z Fold 6 against colorful background

item.title: Qualcomm unveils a pair of chips: Snapdragon 6, 4 series to improve the features you actually use
item.description: Qualcomm's latest Snapdragon 6 and Snapdragon 4 series chips emerge for launch, and they pack sweet upgrades for gamers and everyday phone users.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Snapdragon 6 Gen 5 empowers users with better performance to do more on their phones.
media:content.media:text: The Snapdragon 6 Gen 5 empowers users with better performance to do more on their phones.
media:content.media:title: The Snapdragon 6 Gen 5 empowers users with better performance to do more on their phones.

item.title: Galaxy Ring 2 rumors say no to 2026, point us toward 'an early' 2027 reveal
item.description: Galaxy Ring enjoyers might have to wait again, as a report says 2026 might not be the year for a sequel, either.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Ring and its charging case

item.title: Google just gave me the best reason ever to uninstall Chrome
item.description: An unsettling report shed light on Google's unwanted installation of a 4GB AI model that now resides on computers—yes, yours, too.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Google's answer to Whoop could debut as soon as tomorrow
item.description: Google is expected to launch the Fitbit Air, its screen-less wearable, as soon as tomorrow.

item.title: New Meta Quest games that have the comments saying "my will to live is back!"
item.description: The 2026 Creature Feature included tons of announcements, with plenty of new games, updates for existing games, and more.

item.title: Skip the upgrade — you can get the 'nearly perfected' Motorola Razr Ultra (2025) for $800 LESS than the 2026 model today
item.description: New devices are nice, but what's the point of upgrading when last year's still-great Motorola Razr Ultra (2025) is 46% off at Amazon?
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)

item.title: Honor 600 series hits the UK with big discounts and a pop culture makeover
item.description: Honor's 600 series is now official in the UK, starting at £370 with flagship-style specs and a £200 launch discount.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)

media:content.media:description: Honor 600 Pro in black color variant

item.title: Samsung’s stable One UI 8.5 update officially lands on older Galaxy phones
item.description: Samsung is finally rolling out One UI 8.5 to older Galaxy phones, but after months of delays, most users are probably just relieved the update is actually here.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, Galaxy S25 Plus, and Galaxy S25, next to each other.

item.title: Samsung’s One UI 9 leak just spoiled the Wide Fold’s entire vibe
item.description: Samsung’s One UI 9 leak confirms a wider, more usable Fold is finally coming, while the Z Fold 8 gets a massive battery boost.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A leaked render of the supposed Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide in a black colorway, showing its wider cover and inner displays and a dual camera array.

item.title: Clip this: Netflix's new mobile design is all about short videos and scrolling

item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)

media:content.media:description: Netflix introduces "Clips," a personalized feed that offers vertical videos of content on the platform to share or save for later.
